Author: miwi
Date: Thu May 16 10:29:08 2013
New Revision: 318305
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318305

Log:
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		178589
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile	Thu May 16 09:58:10 2013	(r318304)
+++ head/devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile	Thu May 16 10:29:08 2013	(r318305)
@@ -5,15 +5,19 @@ PORTNAME=	Class-XSAccessor-Array
 PORTVERSION=	1.04
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:SMUELLER
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl5 module for unloading classes
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-AutoXS-Header>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-AutoXS-Header
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
-PERL_CONFIGURE=	YES
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN3=		Class::XSAccessor::Array.3
